gameTitle: The Legend of Zelda: Link's Awakening DX

achievements.title: This Sounds... Familiar
achievements.description: Listen to the secret song on the File Select Screen.
achievements.author: adamjohnny5

achievements.title: Starting Defensively
achievements.description: Acquire the Level-1 Shield from Tarin.
achievements.author: SporyTike

achievements.title: Welcome Back Old Friend
achievements.description: Acquire the Level-1 Sword from Toronbo Shores.
achievements.author: SporyTike

achievements.title: The Shroomless Raccoon
achievements.description: Without ever entering the screen where you acquire the Mushroom, use Magic Powder on the raccoon in the Mysterious Forest.
achievements.author: adamjohnny5

achievements.title: Super... Link?
achievements.description: Find the sleepy mushroom in the Mysterious Forest.
achievements.author: adamjohnny5

achievements.title: A Witch's Secret
achievements.description: Get Magic Powder for the first time.
achievements.author: adamjohnny5

achievements.title: Chattin' with the Cukeman
achievements.description: See all dialogue options available from a transformed Buzz Blob without changing screens.
achievements.author: adamjohnny5

achievements.title: Nutty Power Freak
achievements.description: Pick up either the Guardian Acorn or Triangle of Power, then while one is active, pick up the other.
achievements.author: adamjohnny5

achievements.title: Beyond the Mirage
achievements.description: Get the Tail Key.
achievements.author: adamjohnny5

achievements.title: As Light as a Feather
achievements.description: Acquire the Roc's Feather.
achievements.author: adamjohnny5

achievements.title: Moldorm Mutilator
achievements.description: Defeat Moldorm without being harmed.
achievements.author: SporyTike

achievements.title: Tail Cello
achievements.description: Acquire the Full Moon Cello from the Tail Cave.
achievements.author: SporyTike

achievements.title: Bombs, You Want Some?
achievements.description: Purchase bombs.
achievements.author: adamjohnny5

achievements.title: Beetles Are the Bomb!
achievements.description: In the room left of the entrance inside the Tail Cave, kill the two Hardhat Beetles simultaneously.
achievements.author: adamjohnny5

achievements.title: Tail Cave Cartographer
achievements.description: Enter every room in Tail Cave.
achievements.author: adamjohnny5

achievements.title: Closing Shop For the Day
achievements.description: Get every item from the Trendy Game in one visit and ask the owner for more.
achievements.author: adamjohnny5

achievements.title: This Pond's All Fished Out
achievements.description: Catch every fish in the Fishing Pond in one round, and immediately try to fish anyway without leaving the scene.
achievements.author: adamjohnny5

achievements.title: Cuccos Gone Wild
achievements.description: Provoke a Cucco attack.
achievements.author: adamjohnny5

achievements.title: Here Stands A Brave Man
achievements.description: Agree to be photographed.
achievements.author: Salsa

achievements.title: Beautiful! I'll Call This 'Game Over'
achievements.description: Keep refusing to be photographed.
achievements.author: Salsa

achievements.title: Chomping The Chain That Binds
achievements.description: Rescue Bow-Wow damageless without equipping Roc's Feather or the Shield. Exit and re-enter the area to retry.
achievements.author: adamjohnny5

achievements.title: Brace Yourself
achievements.description: Acquire the Level 1 Power Bracelet.
achievements.author: adamjohnny5

achievements.title: Genie Grappler
achievements.description: Defeat Genie without being harmed.
achievements.author: SporyTike

achievements.title: Bottle Horn
achievements.description: Acquire the Conch Horn from the Bottle Grotto.
achievements.author: SporyTike

achievements.title: Bottle Grotto Cartographer
achievements.description: Enter every room in Bottle Grotto.
achievements.author: adamjohnny5

achievements.title: Where the Swamp Flowers Grow
achievements.description: Have Bow-Wow eat all 15 enemies in Goponga Swamp without getting hit or pressing A or B. Exit and re-enter the area to retry.
achievements.author: adamjohnny5

achievements.title: Crazy Tracy's Secret Medicine
achievements.description: Purchase some Secret Medicine.
achievements.author: adamjohnny5

achievements.title: More Powder!
achievements.description: Get the Magic Powder capacity upgrade from the Mad Batter.
achievements.author: SporyTike

achievements.title: The Goodest of Metal Doges
achievements.description: Have Bow-Wow point out all of the spots where you can dig up Seashells in one session.
achievements.author: adamjohnny5

achievements.title: That Awful Beast!
achievements.description: Have Richard kick you out because you brought Bow-Wow with you.
achievements.author: adamjohnny5

achievements.title: Kiki vs. Bow-Wow
achievements.description: Chase off Kiki the Monkey with Bow-Wow.
achievements.author: adamjohnny5

achievements.title: Diggy Diggy Hole
achievements.description: Purchase a shovel.
achievements.author: adamjohnny5

achievements.title: Richard's Golden Leaves
achievements.description: Collect the 5 Golden Leaves without losing health. Exit and re-enter through either castle entrance to retry.
achievements.author: adamjohnny5

achievements.title: A Composer's Secret
achievements.description: Trigger Totaka's Song in Richard's house.
achievements.author: adamjohnny5

achievements.title: More Holes Than Swiss Cheese
achievements.description: Get the Slime Key without taking damage. To retry, enter and exit the cave at the start of the Pothole Field interior.
achievements.author: adamjohnny5

achievements.title: The Talking Timber
achievements.description: Talk to a talking tree.
achievements.author: adamjohnny5

achievements.title: Speedy Linkalez
achievements.description: Acquire the Pegasus Boots.
achievements.author: adamjohnny5

achievements.title: Slime Slasher
achievements.description: Defeat Slime Eye without being harmed.
achievements.author: SporyTike

achievements.title: Cavern Bell
achievements.description: Acquire the Sea Lily's Bell from the Key Cavern.
achievements.author: SporyTike

achievements.title: Key Cavern Cartographer
achievements.description: Enter every room in Key Cavern.
achievements.author: adamjohnny5

achievements.title: I Have Half A Heart
achievements.description: Obtain 7 Heart Containers.
achievements.author: SporyTike

achievements.title: The Giant Ghini and Friends
achievements.description: Defeat the four ghosts in the top-right section of the Graveyard.
achievements.author: adamjohnny5

achievements.title: Orb Obliterator
achievements.description: Defeat Evil Orb without being harmed.
achievements.author: SporyTike

achievements.title: New Clothes!
achievements.description: Acquire the Red Clothes or the Blue Clothes from the Color Dungeon.
achievements.author: SporyTike

achievements.title: Color Dungeon Cartographer
achievements.description: Enter every room in the Color Dungeon.
achievements.author: adamjohnny5

achievements.title: Inception
achievements.description: Complete the Dream Shrine by opening both chests in one visit without taking damage.
achievements.author: adamjohnny5

achievements.title: Date Night - A Walk on the Beach
achievements.description: Read Marin's note, find her at the beach, and take her to a scenic cliff in one session. Don't go to the cliff without Marin!
achievements.author: adamjohnny5

achievements.title: Date Night - All Is Not Well
achievements.description: Jump into the Well with Marin.
achievements.author: adamjohnny5

achievements.title: Date Night - An Afternoon at the Windmill
achievements.description: While at the Windmill, dig a hole, play the Ocarina, and get your photo taken with Marin in one session.
achievements.author: adamjohnny5

achievements.title: Date Night - Gotta Be Strong For Your Woman
achievements.description: See all of the different reactions Marin has when you exit a dungeon in one session.
achievements.author: adamjohnny5

achievements.title: Date Night - Women Love Bad Boys
achievements.description: See all dialogue for breaking pots, opening drawers, and hitting cuckoos with Marin in one session.
achievements.author: adamjohnny5

achievements.title: Date Night - This Girl's a Pro!
achievements.description: Watch Marin play the Trendy Game
achievements.author: adamjohnny5

achievements.title: The Dangerous Yarna Desert
achievements.description: Travel through the Yarna Desert and get the Angler Key without taking damage. Exit and re-enter the desert to retry.
achievements.author: adamjohnny5

achievements.title: Advice From the Dead
achievements.description: Talk to some skeletal remains in the Yarna Desert.
achievements.author: adamjohnny5

achievements.title: Coo Coo Cachoo
achievements.description: Have the Walrus resurface with a familiar song after having woken him up.
achievements.author: adamjohnny5

achievements.title: That Hippo Yelled At Me
achievements.description: See all the dialogue of the Hippo in Animal Village without leaving the house.
achievements.author: adamjohnny5

achievements.title: Swimming Not Required
achievements.description: Get the Boss Key in the Angler's Tunnel without having the Flippers.
achievements.author: adamjohnny5

achievements.title: A License for Swimming
achievements.description: Acquire the Flippers.
achievements.author: adamjohnny5

achievements.title: Angler Annihilator
achievements.description: Defeat Angler Fish without being harmed.
achievements.author: SporyTike

achievements.title: Angler's Harp
achievements.description: Acquire the Surf Harp from the Angler's Tunnel.
achievements.author: SporyTike

achievements.title: Angler's Tunnel Cartographer
achievements.description: Enter every room in Angler's Tunnel.
achievements.author: adamjohnny5

achievements.title: More Bombs!
achievements.description: Get the Bomb capacity upgrade from the Mad Batter.
achievements.author: SporyTike

achievements.title: A Ghostly Escort
achievements.description: Take the Ghost to his house and his grave in one session.
achievements.author: adamjohnny5

achievements.title: Dust to Dust
achievements.description: Sprinkle some Magic Powder on the Ghost's grave.
achievements.author: adamjohnny5

achievements.title: An Expensive Piece of Wood
achievements.description: Purchase the Bow.
achievements.author: adamjohnny5

achievements.title: Am I Not Supposed to Use These?
achievements.description: Win the first encounter with Master Stalfos by using Bomb Arrows and pick up the small key. Reset to retry.
achievements.author: adamjohnny5

achievements.title: Mini-Boss Masher - Master Stalfos
achievements.description: Defeat the final three encounters with Master Stalfos in Catfish's Maw without taking damage during- and between the fights. Bomb Arrows are NOT allowed.
achievements.author: adamjohnny5

achievements.title: Mini-Boss Masher - Gohma and the Music Man
achievements.description: Defeat both Gohmas without taking damage while armed with only an Ocarina and a Bow. You must play the Ocarina at least once.
achievements.author: adamjohnny5

achievements.title: Hooked on You
achievements.description: Acquire the Hookshot.
achievements.author: adamjohnny5

achievements.title: Eel Eradicator
achievements.description: Defeat Slime Eel without being harmed.
achievements.author: SporyTike

achievements.title: Catfish's Marimba
achievements.description: Acquire the Wind Marimba from the Catfish's Maw.
achievements.author: SporyTike

achievements.title: Catfish's Maw Cartographer
achievements.description: Enter every room in Catfish's Maw.
achievements.author: adamjohnny5

achievements.title: Inspector Link Is on the Case!
achievements.description: Acquire the Magnifying Lens by completing the Trading Sequence.
achievements.author: adamjohnny5

achievements.title: Washed Up Retriever
achievements.description: Acquire the Boomerang.
achievements.author: SporyTike

achievements.title: Money over Troubled Water
achievements.description: Collect 100 Rupees in the Raft Game.
achievements.author: adamjohnny5

achievements.title: Facing the Tiny Face Shrine
achievements.description: Obtain the Face Key without taking damage in either the outside or inside sections of the Ancient Ruins.
achievements.author: adamjohnny5

achievements.title: Now You Know the Truth
achievements.description: Discover the truth behind the Island.
achievements.author: adamjohnny5

achievements.title: Going... Even Further Beyond!
achievements.description: Acquire the Level 2 Power Bracelet.
achievements.author: adamjohnny5

achievements.title: Ballad of the Pol's Voice
achievements.description: Defeat the 3 Pol's Voices in the Face Shrine with the Ocarina.
achievements.author: adamjohnny5

achievements.title: Facade Fighter
achievements.description: Defeat Facade without being harmed.
achievements.author: SporyTike

achievements.title: Face Triangle
achievements.description: Acquire the Coral Triangle from the Face Shrine.
achievements.author: SporyTike

achievements.title: Face Shrine Cartographer
achievements.description: Enter every room in Face Shrine.
achievements.author: adamjohnny5

achievements.title: Music Man
achievements.description: Learn all 3 Ocarina songs.
achievements.author: SporyTike

achievements.title: Pet Sematary
achievements.description: Revive the Flying Rooster.
achievements.author: adamjohnny5

achievements.title: The Keymaster
achievements.description: Obtain all 5 Dungeon Keys.
achievements.author: adamjohnny5

achievements.title: The Chests of Tal Tal Mountain
achievements.description: Open all five of the treasure chests located on one screen on Tal Tal Mountain.
achievements.author: adamjohnny5

achievements.title: The Great Fairies of Koholint Island
achievements.description: Heal yourself at all four Great Fairy locations in one session.
achievements.author: adamjohnny5

achievements.title: The Confusing Owl Statues
achievements.description: Talk to every owl statue on the island in one session.
achievements.author: adamjohnny5

achievements.title: Right Back At Ya!
achievements.description: Acquire the Mirror Shield.
achievements.author: adamjohnny5

achievements.title: Mini-Boss Masher - Grim Creeper
achievements.description: Defeat the Grim Creeper in Eagle's Tower damageless.
achievements.author: adamjohnny5

achievements.title: Eagle Eraser
achievements.description: Defeat Evil Eagle without being harmed.
achievements.author: SporyTike

achievements.title: Tower Organ
achievements.description: Acquire the Organ of Evening Calm from the Eagle's Tower.
achievements.author: SporyTike

achievements.title: Eagle's Tower Cartographer
achievements.description: Enter every room in Eagle's Tower.
achievements.author: adamjohnny5

achievements.title: More Arrows!
achievements.description: Get the Arrow capacity upgrade from the Mad Batter.
achievements.author: SporyTike

achievements.title: You're a Wizzrobe Link!
achievements.description: Acquire the Magic Rod.
achievements.author: adamjohnny5

achievements.title: The Great Dungeon Collector
achievements.description: Collect every Map, Compass, and Stone Beak in all nine dungeons.
achievements.author: adamjohnny5

achievements.title: Teleport Guru
achievements.description: Find all four Warp locations.
achievements.author: adamjohnny5

achievements.title: Hot Head Hustler
achievements.description: Defeat Hot Head without being harmed.
achievements.author: SporyTike

achievements.title: Turtle Drum
achievements.description: Acquire the Thunder Drum from Turtle Rock.
achievements.author: SporyTike

achievements.title: Turtle Rock Cartographer
achievements.description: Enter every room in Turtle Rock.
achievements.author: adamjohnny5

achievements.title: Awaken My Heart
achievements.description: Obtain all 14 Heart Containers.
achievements.author: SporyTike

achievements.title: You Monster!
achievements.description: Kill every animal in Mabe Village without leaving the village.
achievements.author: adamjohnny5

achievements.title: Shell Collection
achievements.description: Collect all possible 26 Secret Seashells across Koholint.
achievements.author: SporyTike

achievements.title: By the Power of Seashells!
achievements.description: Acquire the Level-2 Sword.
achievements.author: SporyTike

achievements.title: The Travels of THIEF
achievements.description: Complete the Photo Album.
achievements.author: Salsa

achievements.title: Koholint Cartographer
achievements.description: Complete the overworld map.
achievements.author: adamjohnny5

achievements.title: Rupee Hoarder
achievements.description: Hold 999 Rupees at once.
achievements.author: SporyTike

achievements.title: Shadow Slayer
achievements.description: Defeat all 6 Shadow Nightmares without being harmed.
achievements.author: SporyTike

achievements.title: It Was All A Dream
achievements.description: Wake the Wind Fish from his slumber.
achievements.author: SporyTike

achievements.title: A Dream Come True
achievements.description: Help Marin fulfill her dream.
achievements.author: SporyTike
